text:
Medicare coverage guidelines governing home health, the patient's plan of care must 
reflect the physician or allowed practitioner ordered services that the HHA provides 
either directly or under arrangement. An HHA would not be responsible for payment in 
the situation in which they have no prior knowledge (unaware of physician or allowed 
practitioner orders) of the services provided by an entity during a 30-day period to a 
patient who is under their home health plan of care. An HHA is
